input.input: Task: Find casual dining restaurants in Rathnapura District, Sri Lanka. Provide for each restaurant: Restaurant name, address, owner, owner's telephone number. Use public sources (official restaurant pages, business directories, Google Maps, Facebook pages, etc.). If owner or phone isn't publicly available, mark as N/A. Aim to compile at least 5-8 entries if possible. Save the deliverable as a markdown file at /_outputs/rathnapura-casual-dining.md. The agent should return: (a) the file path(s) to the produced deliverable(s) and (b) a short summary listing how many entries were found and any notable caveats. Then render the final content for the user from the produced file.
